# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_network (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a Public Cloud VM Instances network from the catalogue, by `id` or by `name`. The resolved network `id` is the value a VM network adapter attaches to via its `network_id`.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve a Public Cloud VM Instances network by name.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_network" "lan" {
  name = "LAN01"
}

# Or by id.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_network" "by_id" {
  id = "003950b2-d03d-47f9-a66d-7e10397803de"
}

# The network id is what a network adapter attaches to.
output "network_id" {
  value = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_network.lan.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the network to retrieve. Conflicts with `name`.
- `name` (String) The name of the network to retrieve. Conflicts with `id`. Network names are not guaranteed unique — if several networks share the name the lookup fails and you must use `id`.
